documentation:
# CLI input and output utils (ciou)

[![CI](https://github.com/kangasta/ciou/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/kangasta/ciou/actions/workflows/ci.yml)
[![Docs](https://github.com/kangasta/ciou/actions/workflows/docs.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/kangasta/ciou/actions/workflows/docs.yml)
[![Release](https://github.com/kangasta/ciou/actions/workflows/release.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/kangasta/ciou/actions/workflows/release.yml)
[![Maintainability](https://api.codeclimate.com/v1/badges/b1f0abcbbb4d64f8b683/maintainability)](https://codeclimate.com/github/kangasta/ciou/maintainability)
[![Test Coverage](https://api.codeclimate.com/v1/badges/b1f0abcbbb4d64f8b683/test_coverage)](https://codeclimate.com/github/kangasta/ciou/test_coverage)

Utilities for working with inputs and outputs of command-line interfaces.

## Testing

Check and automatically fix formatting with:

```sh
pycodestyle ciou
autopep8 -aaar --in-place ciou
```

Run static analysis with:

```sh
pylint -E --enable=invalid-name,unused-import,useless-object-inheritance ciou tst
```

Run unit tests with command:

```sh
python3 -m unittest discover -s tst/
```

Get test coverage with commands:

```sh
coverage run --branch --source ciou/ -m unittest discover -s tst/
coverage report -m
```

Generate the documentation with:

```sh
pdoc -d google -o docs ./ciou
```

functions.name: ciou.types.ensure_list
documentation:
Ensure given `value` is a list:

- If `value` is a list, return `value`.
- If `value` is a generator, return generators content as a list.
- If `value` is not a list, return value wrappep in a list.
- If `value` is `None`, return empty list.

functions.name: ciou.time._timestamp.utcnow
documentation: Return timezone aware datetime object with current UTC time.

functions.name: ciou.time._timestamp.timestamp
documentation: Get current UTC time as ISO 8601 string.

classes.name: ciou.time._ticker.Ticker

methods.name: ciou.time._ticker.Ticker.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the ticker.

Args:
    interval: interval of the ticks in seconds.
    queue: queue where to push the timestamp strings.

methods.name: ciou.time._ticker.Ticker.start
documentation: Start the ticker.

methods.name: ciou.time._ticker.Ticker.stop
documentation: Stop the ticker.
Ticker pushes timestamps to a queue at given interval.

modules.name: ciou
documentation: CLI input and output utils.

functions.name: ciou.color._color.colors
documentation: Create color function that combines multiple colors.

functions.name: ciou.color._color.len_without_ansi_escapes
documentation:
Calculate the length of a string without ANSI escapes.

For example, `len_without_ansi_escapes(bold("example"))` returns `7` while
`len(bold("example"))` returns `15`.

modules.name: ciou.snapshot
documentation: Test utilities for validating output using snapshot files.

functions.name: ciou.snapshot.rewind_and_read
documentation:
Move cursor to the beginning of the file and read file content.

See `snapshot` documentation for example usage.

functions.name: ciou.snapshot.snapshot
documentation:
Testing utility that returns `value` after applying replace\`s and the
value of the snapshot:

- If snapshot exists and `UPDATE_SNAPSHOTS` environment variable is not
  set, return the value defined in the snapshot.
- If snapshot does not exists or `UPDATE_SNAPSHOTS` environment variable
  is set, write given value to the snapshot and return the new snapshot
  value.

Args:

: key: identifier of the snapshot that will be used in the snapshot

  : filename.

  value: value to write into snapshot, if snapshot does not exists or

  : `UPDATE_SNAPSHOTS` environment variable is set.

  directory_name: name to use for directory where the snapshots are stored.
  testfile: the path of the testfile. The snapshots directory is created

  > into the directory where testfile is located in.

  replace: replace patterns, for example durations or UUIDs, in value with

  : given placeholders.

For example:

`` `python
.. include:: ../../examples/snapshot.py
` ``

variables.name: ciou.snapshot.REPLACE_CWD
documentation:
Replace tuple for `snapshot` to remove dynamic durations from snapshots.
For example, `0.673 ms` → `<DURATION>`

variables.name: ciou.snapshot.REPLACE_DURATION
documentation:
Replace tuple for `snapshot` to remove dynamic durations from snapshots.
For example, `0.673 ms` → `<DURATION>`

variables.name: ciou.snapshot.REPLACE_TIMESTAMP
documentation:
Replace tuple for `snapshot` to remove timestamps created with
`ciou.time.timestamp` from snapshot.

variables.name: ciou.snapshot.REPLACE_UUID
documentation: Replace tuple for `snapshot` to remove UUIDs from snapshots.

modules.name: ciou.color
documentation: Library for coloring text with ANSI escapes.

functions.name: ciou.color.color_palette
documentation: Create a string that demonstrates all available colors.

variables.name: ciou.color.Color
documentation: Type for color functions.

modules.name: ciou.progress
documentation:
Library for outputting progress logs to stdout and stderr.

Python implementation of
[UpCloudLtd / progress](https://github.com/UpCloudLtd/progress).

methods.name: ciou.progress._renderer.MessageRenderer.render_message
documentation: Build message text based on the configuration.

methods.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.fallback
documentation:
Returns `True` if current terminal is a Windows terminal that is
not likely capable of rendering unicode characters.

methods.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.show_animation
documentation: Returns `True` if target is TTY and animation is not disabled.

methods.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.get_status_color
documentation: Return the color to use for status indicator.

methods.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.get_details_color
documentation: Return the color to use for message details.

methods.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.get_stop_watch_color
documentation: Return the color to use for stopwatch.

methods.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.get_status_indicator
documentation: Return the status indicator for given status.

methods.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.get_in_progress_animation_frame
documentation:
Return the in-progress animation frame.

Args:
    index: Animation render index that will be used as a basis for
        calculating the current frame: `index % len(animation)`.

methods.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.get_dimensions
documentation:
Returns the dimensions of the target terminal.

See `max_width` and `max_height` for default values in case that
determining terminal dimension failed.

methods.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.max_width
documentation:
Returns target terminals width.

If determining terminal dimensions failed, returns default value from
OutputConfig.

methods.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.max_height
documentation:
Returns target terminals height.

If determining terminal dimensions failed, returns zero.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.default_text_width
documentation:
Fallback value for terminal width in case determining terminal size
fails.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.disable_animation
documentation: Print started message instead of a progress spinner.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.disable_colors
documentation:
Do not render colors regardless of other color related configuration
options.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.force_colors
documentation:
Render colors even if user has `NO_COLOR` environment variable set.
Overrides `disable_colors`.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.show_status_indicator
documentation: Show status indicator before the message.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.status_indicator_map
documentation: Maps `MessageStatus` to a status indicator.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.fallback_status_indicator_map
documentation:
Overrides indicators defined in `status_indicator_map` when `fallback`
returns `True`.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.status_color_map
documentation: Maps `MessageStatus` to a color.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.in_progress_animation
documentation: Animation frames for in-progress animation.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.fallback_in_progress_animation
documentation:
Overrides frames defined in `in_progress_animation` when `fallback`
returns `True`..

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.unknown_color
documentation: Color to use for unknown message status.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.unknown_indicator
documentation: Indicator to use for unknown message status.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.details_color
documentation: Color to use for message details.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.color_message
documentation: Render message text with status color.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.stop_watch_color
documentation: Color to use for stopwatch.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.show_stopwatch
documentation: Render the task duration after message.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._config.OutputConfig.target
documentation: Target file where to render the messages. By default `stderr`.

classes.name: ciou.progress._progress.Progress

methods.name: ciou.progress._progress.Progress.start
documentation: Start the rendering loop on a new thread.

methods.name: ciou.progress._progress.Progress.push
documentation: Push `Update` to the progress log.

methods.name: ciou.progress._progress.Progress.stop
documentation:
Stop the rendering loop after rendering the final state of the
progress log.

methods.name: ciou.progress._progress.Progress.task
documentation:
Helper for automatically pushing updates to the progress log.

For example:

`` `python
.. include:: ../../examples/progress_contextmanager.py
` ``
The main interface of the `ciou.progress` module.

classes.name: ciou.progress._progress.Checks

methods.name: ciou.progress._progress.Checks.push
documentation: Push `Update` to the checks log.

methods.name: ciou.progress._progress.Checks.close
documentation: Close the proress log. Finishes in-progress messages.

methods.name: ciou.progress._progress.Checks.getvalue
documentation: Return the progess log content.

Helper class for writing progress logs to a StringIO output without
animations or threading.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._message.MessageStatus.PENDING
documentation: Message has not been started yet.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._message.MessageStatus.STARTED
documentation: Message has been started and is thus in-progress.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._message.MessageStatus.SUCCESS
documentation: Message has been finished successfully.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._message.MessageStatus.WARNING
documentation: Message has been finished with warning.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._message.MessageStatus.ERROR
documentation: Message has been finished with error.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._message.MessageStatus.SKIPPED
documentation: Message was finished without it reaching in-progress state.

class_variables.name: ciou.progress._message.MessageStatus.UNKNOWN
documentation: Message was finished while it was in-progress.
